name: GIT-COURER
architecture: MCP server that intercepts git operations from AI coding assistants and delegates them to a local Ollama model. Zero tokens spent on git diffs, commits, or branch operations.

name: AXIOM
architecture: Isolated development environments with GPU and local AI on Distrobox + Podman. Each bunker is an independent Arch Linux container — zero dirt on the host.

name: AETHER-PROJECT
architecture: Minimal Astro-based project deployed on Vercel.
initSequence:
npm create astro@latest -- --template minimal
npm run dev
